sorted_actions: WHEN category_l1 = "Professional Services" AND category_l2 = "Software Development Services"
WHEN currency = EUR OR currency = CHF

0.rule_description: Enforces brand-safety review for influencer campaigns in the Marketing category

1.rule_description: Cybersecurity advisory suppliers must demonstrate relevant certifications or equivalent references

2.rule_description: Enforces that named consultant CVs or equivalent capability profiles are required for Software Development Services above 60 consulting days

3.rule_description: Reception and lounge projects require business design sign-off before award

4.rule_description: Ensures suppliers are evaluated only if they support data residency requirements for IT/Cloud Compute requests

5.rule_description: Enforces compatibility review for mobile workstation requests above 50 units in IT category

6.rule_description: At least three compliant supplier options must be compared above EUR/CHF 100000
